extraction_notes: No documented audio/music parameters found in provided sources. TCRF source contains access restriction notice and does not provide game data. Wikipedia source covers Advance Wars (2001, Game Boy Advance), not Super Famicom Wars (1998, SNES) - different game in Wars series. Composer listed on Advance Wars is Taishi Senda, but this does not apply to the requested title. No tempo, key signatures, chord progressions, or SFX characteristics are documented for Super Famicom Wars in available sources.
